label: Immediate Barrier Inspection Required
action: Schedule an immediate on-site inspection of the RED-status barrier. Notify the site HSE manager and assign a responsible inspector within 24 hours.

label: Barrier Monitoring Escalation
action: Increase monitoring frequency for AMBER-status barriers. Review maintenance history and schedule a condition assessment within 7 days.

label: Near-Miss Trend Escalation
action: Escalate near-miss pattern to site manager for review. Conduct a root cause analysis of the contributing factors and implement preventive measures.

label: Overdue Maintenance Priority Scheduling
action: Flag asset for priority maintenance scheduling. Assess whether the maintenance delay impacts barrier integrity or operational safety.

label: Critical Incident Response
action: Initiate incident response protocol. Ensure site leadership is notified, affected area is secured, and investigation team is mobilized within 4 hours.

label: Site-Wide Barrier Health Review
action: Trigger a comprehensive site-wide barrier health review. Multiple degraded barriers at the same site indicate potential systemic issues requiring management attention.

label: Compliance Corrective Action
action: Initiate a corrective action plan for the non-compliant site. Document findings, assign responsible parties, and set a remediation deadline within 30 days.

label: High-Risk Area Enhanced Monitoring
action: Implement enhanced monitoring for the identified high-risk area. Increase inspection frequency and ensure all safety barriers in the area are assessed within 48 hours.

label: Recurring Near-Miss Pattern Investigation
action: Initiate a formal investigation into recurring near-miss patterns. Consider whether existing barriers are adequate and whether additional controls are needed.

label: Asset Condition Assessment Required
action: Schedule a detailed asset condition assessment. Poor asset condition may compromise associated safety barriers and increase operational risk.
